steps.title: Introduce the list of elements
steps.content: The sentence announces "three signature elements" of Brooks's poetic style and then lists them: terse compressed lines, syncopated rhythms, and attention to everyday life. A colon is the natural punctuation to introduce a list or explanation after a complete setup.

steps.title: Reject wrong list breaks
steps.content: A uses a period, leaving the following list fragment disconnected. B uses only a comma, which is too weak to introduce the list clearly. D uses a semicolon, but the material after it is not an independent clause. The answer is C.
